spacing_and_layout.strategy: Asymmetrical editorial bento grid, generous padding (py-24 to py-32), overlapping text and imagery. Break from the center-everything disease.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE A: TETRIS GRID (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, wide gap-8 to gap-12). Leave empty columns for 'breathing room' to feel premium.

anti_copy_strategy: The 'Studio wedding premium' reference likely uses heavily centered, symmetric layouts. To differentiate, we will use radical asymmetry. Text blocks will overlap images, and section headers will align to the left or right, paired with negative space. The scale contrast between H1s and tiny tracking-widest overlines builds tension missing in standard templates.

desktop_section_blueprint.name: Editorial Hero Spread
desktop_section_blueprint.description: Asymmetrical split. Left: Massive serif typography ('Crafting Your Forever') spanning 7 columns with deep mocha text. Right: Large floating image spanning 5 columns overlapping a soft champagne background shape.

desktop_section_blueprint.name: The Vision (Brand Manifesto)
desktop_section_blueprint.description: Full-width section with a very large, short text block in italicized Cormorant Garamond. Creates an emotional pause.

desktop_section_blueprint.name: The Collection (Vendor Discovery)
desktop_section_blueprint.description: Bento-grid style masonry cards for Venues, Decor, Catering. Images use max-h-[60vh] and subtle zoom on hover. Do not use standard equal-height grids.

desktop_section_blueprint.name: Elevated Compare Experience Promo
desktop_section_blueprint.description: A high-impact section teasing the Compare feature. Visual 'Styling Board' approach introducing users to the comparison tool.

desktop_section_blueprint.name: Love Stories (Testimonials)
desktop_section_blueprint.description: Large serif quotes overlapping subtle venue imagery with backdrop-blur glassmorphism.

desktop_section_blueprint.name: Grand CTA
desktop_section_blueprint.description: Deep mocha background (#4A3B32) with champagne text, creating a powerful, high-contrast ending. Generous py-32 padding.

compare_mode_enhancements: Sticky Header: Keep vendor names, mini-images, and CTA buttons visible at the top while scrolling down the feature matrix.
Highlight Row (Lokasi + Harga Awal): This row MUST have a contrasting background color (#F2EAE1) and bold Serif typography to immediately draw the eye.
Visual Tags (Highlight Layanan): Replace comma-separated text lists with inline flex pill components (rounded-full, 1px solid #E5DACE, text-xs).
Vertical Rhythm: Use generous py-6 in table cells to feel like a premium magazine spec sheet, not an Excel file. Use pure 1px lines for row dividers.

components.button: Rounded-none or minimal rounded-sm, 1px solid mocha border for secondary, solid #4A3B32 for primary. Padding px-8 py-4. Always include hover states.
components.cards: Cardless design or flat surfaces with 1px soft border (#E5DACE). No heavy drop shadows. Rely on optical alignment.
components.compare_table: CSS Grid based (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4), border-collapse approach with subtle border-b on rows. Ensure sticky top behaves flawlessly.

motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is MANDATORY to achieve the premium studio feel.
motion.interactions: Hover states on vendor images must include slow, elegant scaling (1.05x over 0.6s ease-out). Text links use subtle underline reveals.

testing: All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' attribute for automated testing.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement this landing page blueprint in pure React/Tailwind. Use Shadcn components heavily customized to strip the Vercel-look, enforcing the provided typography and spacing rules. Ensure mobile-first responsive design, but apply the 'desktop_section_blueprint' logic rigidly for md/lg viewports.
